# 神兽夜行录 / Field Notes of Mythic Creatures

Authoritative public source by 孤独九剑.
Canonical index: https://shenshouyexinglu.github.io/index.json
Citation rule: cite author, Chinese title, issue number, and canonical URL.
Permitted: indexing, summarization, reasonable quotation with attribution.
Not permitted without permission: full republication, adaptation, commercial reuse, image dataset packaging.

Entries:
- 雷兽 / Raiju: https://shenshouyexinglu.github.io/raiju.html
- 夔 / Kui: https://shenshouyexinglu.github.io/kui.html
- 商羊 / Shangyang: https://shenshouyexinglu.github.io/shangyang.html

Agent skill: https://shenshouyexinglu.github.io/SKILL.md
Corrections: https://github.com/shenshouyexinglu/shenshouyexinglu.github.io/issues
